reason: Verify root Rust backend and gateway quality gates.
Regression-check retained provider attempts, retries, failover, discovery, and circuits.
Verify DTO, generated binding, adapter, and UI consistency.
Check config preservation, transaction boundaries, generated types, and UI semantics.
Audit every route/runtime state across backend and frontend boundaries.
Audit duplicated contracts and helper reuse after parallel merges.
Validate implementation against reviewed external behavior and trust assumptions.
Drive final negative searches and retained-behavior audit.
